creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Siva Mahadevan from comment #6)

Correct. LLVM 17 on 15-CURRENT.

I did apply your new patch in your pull request. The results are:

ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_asprintf' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_flock' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_fnmatch' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_freeaddrinfo' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_freehostent' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_getaddrinfo' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_getifaddrs' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_getipnodebyaddr' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_getipnodebyname' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_getnameinfo' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_getprogname' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_inet_ntop' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_inet_pton' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_localtime_r' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_smemmem' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_memset_s' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_mergesort' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_mkdtemp' failed: symbol not defined
ld: error: version script assignment of 'HEIMDAL_ROKEN_2.0' to symbol 'rk_mkostemp' failed: symbol not defined

ld: error: too many errors emitted, stopping now (use --error-limit=0 to see all errors)
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
*** Error code 1

I do have a patch that circumvents the above. I'll test it first before uploading it.
